reason: Successfully navigated to the Super Agent application, located and clicked on agent QA-20260415-185924-8tgo with idle status, sent a message asking "Hello! What is 2+2?", and received the correct response "4." within 2 seconds.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Successfully loaded the Super Agent home page showing the list of available agents in the sidebar.
Clicked on agent "QA-20260415-185924-8tgo" in the sidebar - Agent detail page opened, displaying the agent name and message input interface.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Agent status displayed as "idle" in the top navigation bar, satisfying the requirement.
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field - Message was successfully entered into the textbox.
Clicked the Send button - Message was sent successfully, creating a new session called "Math Question Assistance Session".
Waited for agent response - Agent responded very quickly with "4." which is the correct answer to the math question 2+2.
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Response clearly displays "4." as the complete answer, confirming the agent understood and correctly answered the mathematical question.
